name: Avatar
description: A flexible avatar component for displaying user profile images, icons, or initials with various sizes and shapes.
usage_guidelines: Use to represent users or entities visually in the interface.
Provide src for image avatars, icon for icon-based avatars, or text children for initial-based avatars.
Choose appropriate size based on context (sm for lists, md for cards, lg for profiles).
Use shape prop to match your design system (round for users, square for organizations).
Always provide alt text for accessibility when using images.

alt.description: Alternative text for the avatar image (accessibility).

icon.description: Icon element to display instead of image or text.

size.description: Avatar size. Use predefined sizes or custom pixel value.

srcSet.description: Responsive image source set for different screen densities.

styling_info.visual_description: A circular or square container displaying either an image, icon, or text initials. Text automatically scales to fit the container. Images are cropped to fill the shape with lazy loading.

Do: Provide alt text for image avatars
Use consistent sizes across similar contexts
Provide fallback content (initials) when image fails to load
Use appropriate shape for the entity type
Dont: Don't use very large custom sizes that dominate the layout
Don't forget to handle missing images gracefully
Don't use onClick without visual indication of interactivity
